title: Your AI Agent Is Missing Half the Internet… Until Now (Agent-Reach)
summary: Agent-Reach is an open source tool that extends AI agent capabilities by providing real internet context across Western platforms like Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, and GitHub, as well as Chinese platforms like Bilibili and Xiaohongshu. It enables coding agents to access discussions, social feedback, tutorials, issues, and non-English research beyond their local codebase.
writeup: The video introduces Agent-Reach, an open source tool that gives AI agents real internet context beyond a local codebase. Coverage spans Western platforms (Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub) and Chinese platforms (Bilibili, Xiaohongshu), letting coding agents pull discussions, social feedback, tutorials, issues, and non-English research. The takeaway is multi-platform retrieval and semantic search integrated as agent tooling, addressing the gap left when agents lack access to live, cross-platform sources.
